overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

## Discussion

This function determines how much data you can be guaranteed to obtain in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLRead(_:_:_:_:)] function. This function does not block or cause any low-level read operations to occur.

# SSLGetBufferedReadSize(_:_:)

**Function**

Determines how much data is available to be read.

## Declaration

```swift
func SSLGetBufferedReadSize(_ context: SSLContext, _ bufferSize: UnsafeMutablePointer<Int>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **context**: An SSL session context reference.
- **bufferSize**: On return, the size of the data to be read.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

## Discussion

This function determines how much data you can be guaranteed to obtain in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLRead(_:_:_:_:)] function. This function does not block or cause any low-level read operations to occur.
title: SSLGetBufferedReadSize(_:_:)
